placement_formula: top_left_x = origin_x + (i - j) * 60; top_left_y = origin_y + (i + j) * 30; draw sorted by (i + j) ascending
draw_order: sort by i+j ascending; lower/near tiles cover the 4px lip of upper/far tiles; top face has no stroke, so internal seams stay visually silent

quality_checks.meowa_texture_rejected: workflow-texture_gen-3fa8f3ae9f714a75a535783d produced black block artifacts in seamless carpet texture
